assignments.name: Set_URL_Field_To_varRetrievedDocLink_Variable
assignments.label: Set URL Field To varRetrievedDocLink Variable

decisions.description: Send the flow down the appropriate path based on the object definition it got triggered from.
decisions.name: Entity_Definition_of_Triggering_Object
decisions.label: Entity Definition of Triggering Object

decisions.description: If URL field is populated, use this field to populate the varRetrievedDocLink variable
decisions.name: Is_URL_Field_Populated
decisions.label: Is URL Field Populated?

decisions.description: Send the flow down the appropriate path based on the object definition it got triggered from.
decisions.name: Object_To_Update
decisions.label: Object To Update

Flow.description: Flow can be embedded on the record page of any object where the External Document Link field appears. Surfaces the link through a screen flow allowing for long links that don't break.

formulas.description: Shows up to the first 150 characters of the document link variable
formulas.name: f_DocumentLinkTruncated

formulas.description: Isolates the first 3 characters of recordId to be used for getting the Entity Definition of record from which the screen flow was launched.
formulas.name: f_KeyPrefix

Flow.interviewLabel: Prodigy - Screen - Document Link Across Objects {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Prodigy - Screen - Document Link Across Objects

fields.name: ErrorMessage
fields.fieldText:
There was an issue processing your request:


{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

textTemplates.description: Text template that surfaces the document link variable with an inbuilt link to the document link's url.
textTemplates.name: tt_DocumentLink

variables.description: The Id of the record from which this flow got launched.
variables.name: recordId

variables.description: When a user selects to update a document link, this variable is used to store the old (deleted) document link and populate it as a default in the input for creating a new document link
variables.name: varPlaceholderDocumentLink

variables.description: Variable to hold the document link from whichever Get Query is triggered in the flow's path.
variables.name: varRetrievedDocumentLink
